  "description": "Dukes Neurosurgery and Specialist Hospital is a multi-specialist hospital located in the heart of Lagos, Nigeria, dedicated to providing world-class neurosurgical and specialized medical care. Our mission is to provide patient-centered, world-class healthcare services in the field of surgery with the help of well-trained super-specialists and committed staff.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Customer Service Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island,&nbsp;Lagos
Job Type:&nbsp;Full-Time

Role Description


	Join Our Team as a Customer Service Representative Victoria Island Branch . You ensure a seamless experience in the hospital. You&#39;ll provide compassionate support, schedule appointments, guide patients through the admission and discharge processes, and address inquiries with professionalism.
	Special attention will be given to surgery patients, offering them empathetic care, timely updates, and clear communication about procedures and follow-ups.


Responsibilities


	Communicate with customers via phone, email and chat
	Provide knowledgeable answers to questions about product, pricing and availability
	Work with internal departments to meet customer&#39;s needs
	Data entry in various platforms


Qualifications


	1 - 3 years of relevant work experience
	Proven experience as a Customer Service Representative or a similar customer-facing role.
	Experience in the healthcare or service industry is a plus.


Skill:


	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong active listening and interpersonal skills.
	Proficient in using CRM tools and basic computer applications (e.g., Microsoft Office Suite).
	Problem-solving skills and the ability to handle challenging situations calmly and professionally.
	Strong organizational skills with the ability to multitask and prioritize effectively.


Personal Attributes:


	Customer-focused with a friendly and empathetic demeanor.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.
	Attention to detail and accuracy.
	A team player with a positive attitude.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@dukesneurosurgerysh.com&nbsp;and&nbsp;hr@dukesneurosurgerysh.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Customer Service Representative Job at Dukes Neurosurgery and Specialist Hospital




        
    

        
        Dukes Neurosurgery and Specialist Hospital is a multi-specialist hospital located in the heart of Lagos, Nigeria, dedicated to providing world-class neurosurgical and specialized medical care. Our mission is to provide patient-centered, world-class healthcare services in the field of surgery with the help of well-trained super-specialists and committed staff.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Job Type: Full-Time

Role Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Join Our Team as a Customer Service Representative Victoria Island Branch . You ensure a seamless experience in the hospital. You'll provide compassionate support, schedule appointments, guide patients through the admission and discharge processes, and address inquiries with professionalism.
	Special attention will be given to surgery patients, offering them empathetic care, timely updates, and clear communication about procedures and follow-ups.


Responsibilities


	Communicate with customers via phone, email and chat
	Provide knowledgeable answers to questions about product, pricing and availability
	Work with internal departments to meet customer's needs
	Data entry in various platforms


Qualifications


	1 - 3 years of relevant work experience
	Proven experience as a Customer Service Representative or a similar customer-facing role.
	Experience in the healthcare or service industry is a plus.


Skill:


	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong active listening and interpersonal skills.
	Proficient in using CRM tools and basic computer applications (e.g., Microsoft Office Suite).
	Problem-solving skills and the ability to handle challenging situations calmly and professionally.
	Strong organizational skills with the ability to multitask and prioritize effectively.


Personal Attributes:


	Customer-focused with a friendly and empathetic demeanor.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.
	Attention to detail and accuracy.
	A team player with a positive attitude.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] and [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Junior Network Solutions Engineer (NYSC) Job at Prolato Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Prolato Technologies Limited is an indigenous ICT company with a clear and dedicated focus on ICT ICT Infrastructure, IT Security, support and professional services delivery. We are visionary and a reliable IT partner filling in the gaps in the IT sector. We accomplish this by analyzing each business’s needs, ensuring that every project delivers the right solutions to meet strategic business targets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Network Solutions Engineer (NYSC)
Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Support with technical qualification of sales opportunities
	Provide answers to (technical) questions in a Request for Information(RFI) or a Request for Proposal (RFP) and Request for Quotation (RFQ)
	Build custom demonstrations or Proof Of Concepts (POC) when/where necessary.
	Understand IT infrastructure and network architectures.
	Can design, present, and deliver tailored technology solutions that drive client success.
	Enjoy collaborating across teams and engaging with enterprise customers.
	If you’re passionate about combining technical precision with business strategy, this is your opportunity to make an impact with a team that thrives on innovation and excellence.
	Daily administrative tasks, reporting, and communication with the relevant departments in the organization.


Requirements


	Minimum academic qualification of bachelor’s degree in computer science or a technology-related field from a recognized University.
	0-2 years of experience in network engineering
	Hands-on experience with Cisco network devices such as switches , router a plus
	Relevant certifications a plus (e.g., CompTIA A+, CCNA )
	Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
	Good presentation skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.
